name: codex-fullstack-delivery
description: Contract-first full-stack delivery workflow with concise skill rules, role-scoped references, and DDD-guided backend feature development.

interface.shortDescription: Full-stack agent team with DDD-guided backend delivery.
interface.longDescription: Coordinates frontend, backend, and test agents for contract-first full-stack delivery. Backend agents use the bundled DDD workflow for new business features before producing API documentation, frontend/backend integration, automated smoke checks, browser E2E verification, acceptance runbooks, test-case-first automation, post-test demo prompts, and evidence-based visual demos.
defaultPrompt: Coordinate backend, frontend, and test agents.
Use the DDD workflow for backend new business feature development.
